label: Job giver deliver pawn to cell
description: Directs a pawn to carry another pawn to a target cell. Inherits all base ThinkNode fields.

exactCell.label: Exact cell
exactCell.description: If true, the carrier must reach the exact destination cell.

locomotionUrgency.label: Locomotion urgency
locomotionUrgency.description: Movement speed mode used while carrying the pawn to the destination.
